title: TSE auto-scaling
subtitle: Recommendation-first scaling for cloud TSE capacity. Soft backup stubs only when AutoProvision is enabled in Development.
autoProvisionHint: Never creates live cloud TSS or Startbeleg. Default is recommend-only.
emptySelect: Select a tenant to configure auto-scaling.

simulationNote: Evaluations are recommendation-only unless AutoProvision is on in Development.
